Operation 'listAllPackages' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Added explicit mention of Accept header usage, clarified response formats, and included use cases to improve AI agent interpretability for determining when to call this endpoint and how to handle responses.

data.current_summary: List all packages in the simple index
data.current_description: Returns an HTML page listing all projects hosted on PyPI, following PEP 503 (Simple Repository API). Each project is linked to its simple project page. This endpoint can also return JSON when the appropriate Accept header is sent.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a listing of all projects hosted on PyPI following PEP 503 (Simple Repository API). By default returns an HTML page with links to each project's simple project page. Supports JSON response format via Accept header (PEP 691). Useful for discovering all available packages or implementing package repository clients.
data.reasoning: Description mentions HTML and JSON support but lacks clarity on when/how to use each format and what the actual response structure contains. Added explicit mention of Accept header usage, clarified response formats, and included use cases to improve AI agent interpretability for determining when to call this endpoint and how to handle responses.

message: Operation 'searchPackages' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks critical input details (what the query parameter accepts, how search works) and output details (what the HTML contains, how results are structured). Added specifics about query parameter behavior, result ranking, and use cases. Clarified the HTML-only limitation more prominently. These additions significantly improve AI agent ability to determine when to use this endpoint and how to parse/interpret results.

data.current_description: Searches for packages on PyPI matching the given query. Returns an HTML results page. Note: the PyPI search endpoint returns HTML, not JSON.
data.description_suggestion: Searches PyPI packages by query string and returns an HTML results page containing matching projects with brief descriptions and download links. Query parameter accepts package names, keywords, and descriptions. Note: This endpoint returns HTML only, not JSON. Results are ranked by relevance. Useful for discovering packages by name or functionality.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical input details (what the query parameter accepts, how search works) and output details (what the HTML contains, how results are structured). Added specifics about query parameter behavior, result ranking, and use cases. Clarified the HTML-only limitation more prominently. These additions significantly improve AI agent ability to determine when to use this endpoint and how to parse/interpret results.
